'''Guardsman 22716''' was the designation of a member of the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]]. A combat veteran, Guardsman 22716 was serving in a regular [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] unit as his rotation back into active combat service after already serving a tour of duty as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]].<ref name="HS" />
